description_long: This object is a model of a hostel building with a distinctive, angular roof and a facade featuring a sepia-toned photographic print of a historic European-style structure. The building has two main stories, with a symmetrical arrangement of windows and a central entrance, flanked by small trees or shrubs along the base. The roof is multi-faceted, with sharp, geometric planes that give the structure a modern, abstracted appearance. The photographic print on the exterior shows ornate architectural details such as cornices, arched windows, and a balcony, suggesting a late 19th or early 20th-century design. The sides of the object are flat and display a stretched, blurred continuation of the photographic texture, while the front and back showcase the main facade of the building. The overall appearance combines elements of traditional architecture with a contemporary, artistic presentation.
description: A hostel building model with a sepia-toned photographic facade of a historic European-style structure, featuring a multi-faceted angular roof and symmetrical windows. The exterior blends classic architectural details with a modern, abstract form.
description_view_0: The front view displays the main facade with ornate windows, a central entrance, and small trees along the base, all rendered in a sepia photographic style.
description_view_1: The side view shows a flat, narrow surface with a blurred, horizontal stretch of the photographic texture, lacking architectural detail.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, showing the same sepia-toned facade with windows and trees, but with slight differences in the roof's angular geometry.
description_view_3: The opposite side view is similar to view 1, with a flat, blurred surface and no distinct architectural features.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the front facade, marked by a small arched doorway beneath a decorative cornice. The entrance is flanked by windows and small trees, with no visible steps, ramps, or canopies. The door appears to be integrated into the photographic print, with no distinct physical separation.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on both stories of the front and back facades, with rectangular shapes and decorative frames. The windows are evenly spaced, contributing to a balanced, classical appearance. No shutters or additional decorative elements are visible beyond the frames.
attribute_balcony_presence: A single balcony is present above the main entrance, featuring a small, ornate railing and supported by decorative brackets. The balcony is centrally located and visually prominent.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a blend of late 19th-century European historicist style with modern, abstract geometric influences in the roof design. The facade suggests influences from Neoclassical or Victorian architecture, while the overall form is contemporary and artistic.
